title: Home Screen - Charger case pop up appears after 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th 15th... app launch
scenario: Charging case pop-up dialog reappears on home screen on repeated app launches when case firmware is outdated
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. On the Home screen, connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device whose charging case is on outdated firmware.
3. Observe the charging case pop-up dialog appears on the Home screen.
5. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe whether the charging case pop-up dialog appears again on the Home screen.
8. Repeat steps 5–7 multiple times (e.g., on the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th, 15th launch).
expected: The charging case pop-up dialog should appear only on the first connection after pairing, and should NOT reappear on subsequent app restarts or launches.
